label: Body part to drop
description: Specifies a body part group and an optional thing to spawn when a pawn of this kind is butchered.

bodyPartGroup.label: Body part group
bodyPartGroup.description: BodyPartGroupDef identifying which body part group produces this drop.

thing.label: Thing
thing.description: ThingDef spawned when this body part is butchered.

allowMale.label: Allow male
allowMale.description: If true, this drop applies to male pawns.

allowFemale.label: Allow female
allowFemale.description: If true, this drop applies to female pawns.
